resources.string: Your shop assistant — stock, sales, and insights in one place.
See today\'s POS total at the top of Transactions (Insights → Transactions or Sales → history). For a full close-day summary, use Sales → menu → Close day.
Items running low will be listed here.
This screen is a placeholder for upcoming features.
Each option is shown in that language\'s native script.
No products yet.\nTap + to add, scan a barcode, or scan a receipt.
Delete \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone. Past receipts still show the name stored on those sales.
Camera permission is required to scan barcodes.
Camera permission is needed to take a product photo.
Could not save that image. Try another photo.
We could not read a numeric price from the first line. Review the text below and enter a price manually.
Could not read the receipt automatically. Please enter items below.
No valid lines to add. Check name, quantity, and cost.
Voice input is not available on this device.
Device does not meet AI requirements.
⚠ This download uses approximately 2.5 GB of mobile data. Connect to Wi-Fi if possible.
The Gemma AI model is approximately %1$d MB. Ensure you have enough storage and a stable connection.
The existing model will be deleted and downloaded again.
AI features will be unavailable until the model is re-downloaded.
Download, benchmark, or switch the on-device AI model. The primary model is used for all AI features.
Benchmark failed — model may not be loaded

FunctionGemma is gated on Hugging Face. While logged in, open litert-community/functiongemma-270m-ft-mobile-actions and accept the Gemma license (required even with a read token). Then create a classic read token at huggingface.co/settings/tokens and paste it here.
Match Google AI Edge Gallery: max tokens, Top‑K / Top‑P / temperature, CPU vs GPU, and prompt options. Saving reloads the on-device engine.
Ranges follow Edge Gallery. Partial‑AI devices cap max tokens at 2048 for stability.
When off, chat prompts ask for direct answers only. Native “thinking” mode is not exposed in this SDK build.
When off, chat prompts ask for standard decoding. Speculative decoding is not exposed in this SDK build.
Configurations saved. The model will reload on the next reply.
Optional: send shop data to your own HTTPS endpoint for heavy analytics or dashboards. Your on-device Gemma model is unchanged. Nothing is uploaded until you tap an upload action.
A key is already saved. Enter a new key only if you want to replace it.
Send a JSON snapshot (products, sales, customers, debts, alerts, and pre-aggregated sale facts) to your endpoint? Chat message text is not included.
This sends the complete SQLite database, including chat sessions if present. Only proceed if you trust the destination and understand your privacy obligations.
Save an API key first (or enter one and tap Save connection).
Product line and edition from your licence key. Shop owners can upgrade to Pro by entering a new key.
Licence updated. Pro features are now %1$s.
Licence key is invalid or expired.
This feature requires Biashara AI Pro. Enter a Pro licence in Settings.
No services yet. Tap + to add your first service.
Save the service first to generate a QR code
Enter a service name and price
Service QR requires Biashara AI Pro
Services, vouchers, and service agents are now available. Add services in Inventory → Services.
Used for prices, POS, receipts, and money shown in insights.
Could not transcribe audio. Please try again.
Microphone permission is required for voice input.
Ask anything about your inventory, sales, expenses, or business performance
You have not added any products yet. Open Inventory to add your first product.
You have %1$d products. Total stock value: %2$s.
I can help with inventory, profit and loss, spending, and low stock. Try asking about one of these.
I don\'t see anything matching \"%1$s\" in your inventory.\n\nYour products: %2$s
You haven\'t recorded any sales yet.
On %1$s (local date), recorded sales total %2$s (%3$d income sale(s)).
On %1$s (local date), no sales have been recorded yet.
On %1$s (local date), no itemized POS sale lines were recorded (or all lines were returns).
You haven\'t added any products or recorded any transactions yet. Open Inventory or Sales to get started.
Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
The on-device model took too long. Here is a quick answer from your records:\n\n%1$s
What is my profit this month?
Which products are low on stock?
How many products do I have?
Could not open "%1$s". Open the right screen from the menu or rephrase.
Voice input is not available on this device.
Microphone, on-device speech recognition, and spoken replies.

Shows the microphone in Chat, POS search, and product naming when the switch above is on. On-device recognition is used when a model is prepared below; otherwise the system recognizer may run (on many devices that can send short audio to Google for processing).
Download the speech recognition model once on Wi‑Fi if prompted, then use Prepare below. Adjust read-aloud speed and when the app speaks automatically.
End of phrase after %.2f s silence
On-device model loaded — ready to transcribe.
Model not loaded — tap Prepare to download and load (needs network the first time).
Biashara AI voice check. If you hear this, read aloud is working.
Enter a topic or question. It will be placed in the input box; send when ready. If augment is on, English Wikipedia snippets are fetched for that text (network).
Skill hint added — type your question, then send.
Image attached — add a note or send as-is.

First token: %1$d ms
Decode time: %2$d ms
Approx. tokens: %3$d
Throughput: %4$s tok/s
Point the camera at the product name on the label
Search by name, phone, or email
Scan barcode to add to cart
Select a customer for balance / deposit sales
Paste the SMS or USSD reply from your carrier
Could not find a reference in that text.
Please select a customer to sell on credit.
Cart is empty — add items before confirming.
Use On credit to complete this sale.
Credit sales are not available while split payment is on.
Select a customer before recording credit.
Amount must match the sale total.
No ledger entries yet. Sales and expenses will appear here automatically.
Could not open the SMS app.
That debt is no longer available.
Add a phone number for this customer to send a reminder.
Hi %1$s, friendly reminder you have a balance of %2$s %3$.2f with us (%4$d days). Thanks.
Hi %1$s, we have missed you at the shop — it has been %2$d days since your last visit. We would love to see you again.
Select at least one line to return.
Enter a valid quantity for each selected line.
Generate a culturally appropriate negotiation script before you meet a supplier (on-device AI).
This feature requires a higher-end device. It is available on devices with 4GB+ RAM.
Select at least one inventory product or add other items.
Enter a valid total budget greater than zero.
Download the AI model in Settings to generate a script.
Download the AI model in Settings to parse orders.
Could not parse a product list from that message.
You are offline. Connect to a network, then try again.
That message is too long to parse. Share a shorter order (under 8,000 characters).
Order-from-message needs the on-device AI model and a capable device (not rules-only mode). Try again after upgrading hardware or downloading the model in Settings.
%d items could not be matched and were skipped.
No matched products to record. Match or remove lines first.
Share a customer message from WhatsApp (or any app) to Biashara AI, or paste the order text from your clipboard below.
Everything looks good! Your business is running smoothly.
This action type is not executable yet.
Here is your week in numbers — open Insights for charts and receipts.
Keep paired movers visible at the till and mention the second item when customers buy the first.
There is no linked screen for this action.
Stock, fraud, and cash-flow reminders from your agents.
Running balance, money in/out, manual entries, and cash counts. Sales and expenses are recorded automatically.
See when each agent last ran and expand a row for recent outcomes.
No logged runs yet. The next scheduled pass will appear here.
You\'ve finished this lesson. Keep using the feature to build your confidence.
No help available for this screen.
Tell the agent about your business
Welcome to Biashara AI! I will ask a few short questions so your agents know your business story.
What do you sell or offer? Describe in your own words.
When are you open? (days and hours)
Who are your main suppliers or partners?
What is your main business goal right now? (include a monthly revenue target if you have one)
Your business profile is saved. Agents will use this from now on.
Please give a slightly longer answer.
Help agents know your story — name, customers, hours, goals
Tell the agent about your business
Could not read the document. Try again or enter manually.
Saving unverified cash-out. Attach proof later.
Paste the full SMS text here…
M-Pesa SMS detected in clipboard. Tap to paste.
Scan these cards to auto-fill cash entries. Print and post them near each payment point.
This QR code may have been altered. Do not honour any warranty claim.
Scan this QR code at each visit
